session.user:
Run prettier check on the two changed files and report results: - docs/learned/integrations/github-review-decision.md - docs/learned/tui/status-indicators.md
Use: prettier --check docs/learned/integrations/github-review-decision.md docs/learned/tui/status-indicators.md
session.assistant: I'll run prettier check on those two files for you.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Check prettier formatting on two documentation files

session.tool_result:
Exit code 1 [[33mwarn[39m] docs/learned/integrations/github-review-decision.md [[33mwarn[39m] docs/learned/tui/status-indicators.md [[33mwarn[39m] Code style issues found in 2 files. Run Prettier with --write to fix.
Checking formatting...
session.assistant:
prettier failed: 2 files need formatting
**Files with formatting issues:** - docs/learned/integrations/github-review-decision.md - docs/learned/tui/status-indicators.md
Both files have code style issues that can be fixed by running prettier with the `--write` flag.
